family_definition: (top_project, rel_dir stripped of generic components, filename stem with numeric/date/window suffixes stripped and long digit runs masked, colset_sig = md5 of the file's full sorted column-name set)
deviations: 'flow' alone does not fire network_telemetry (would hit streamflow/cash-flow); it requires a second telemetry token (n_bytes/n_packets/sum_n_dest/netflow)
notes: nothing dropped or capped; domain/dataset_family are structural bookkeeping; channel_kind and generating_process stay metadata-only.
